name: Traqer Corp.
summary: Traqer Corp. researches, develops, and sells building material in the People's Republic of China. The company offers decoration-free wall materials and precast walls manufactured from recycled solid wastes. Its products include core-filled wall mortised concrete blocks, decorative mortised concrete blocks, antique-style narrow bricks, and squeeze-type building mortars. The company serves governments, construction and real estate companies, and households. Traqer Corp. is based in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
